patterns.message: Upslope event Day 4: S/SE wind at 129°, humidity 97%, temp -4°C. Enhanced orographic snowfall likely.
Wind slab risk Day 5: 25 km/h wind with 10cm recent snow. Wind loading on north aspects.
Close to cold snap Day 8: 5°C drop to -9°C (needs >5°C drop below -5°C).
